emails.subject: Re: Morn Meet 10/26/01
emails.body: Re: Morn Meet 10/26/01 Is the system running ok this morning? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Morn Meet 10/26/01
emails.body: RE: Morn Meet 10/26/01 Shel, Everything ok except enron has credible attack threat. Cops all in our two buildings Mike said had bomb dogs in gas control. Many many cops outside our buildings and in garage. Called Linda Laferla at home for a comp day to access our system and monitor just in case. I'm sure you have already heard all about it. Maybe we need to talk to our bunch about it. Fireball Howard To: Howard, Jack

emails.subject: RE: Morn Meet 10/26/01
emails.body: RE: Morn Meet 10/26/01 I heard. I'm just pulling intop garage and will call back in a minute Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
